title: Super Markup Man
description: Super Markup Man is a unique blend of puzzle platforming and real web development education. Learn the fundamentals of HTML and CSS in a hands-on, no-code environment where every level challenges your logic and creativity.Features 🧠 100 handcrafted levels combining web dev learning with puzzle-solving 🔤 HTML Mode that covers basic tags like , , , and more 🎨 CSS Mode to style elements with selectors, colors, and layouts 🧪 Bug mode to add random errors that must be squashed 🕹️ Local co-op mode to learn with a friend* 💾 Free Play Mode to export your levels as real HTML files 👪 Family-friendly and beginner-friendly, perfect for classrooms or home * Note: Only Free Play and CSS Mode support local co-op. Player 2 will also need to use a gamepad (Xbox gamepad recommended).
description_short: Learn HTML and CSS through a 2D puzzle platformer! Carry and place real web tags, solve logic-based levels, and build your own web page templates. No coding needed!
